prompt: gonna hop off for lunch, can you jot down where we left off with the rate limiter so I don't lose context
assertions: Despite no explicit 'handoff' keyword in the prompt, a properly formatted handoff document was still produced (not a generic freeform note)
A handoff markdown file exists under a .claude/handoffs/<repo>/ path with a YYYY-MM-DD_HHMM_description.md-shaped filename
Document contains all required headings: Task(s), Recent Changes, Learnings, Chronicle Candidates, Artifacts, Action Items & Next Steps, Other Notes
